abstract: Implementation guide for the Velt Node SDK (@veltdev/node) covering its two backends — sdk.api.* (REST API, 17 services) and sdk.selfHosting.* (MongoDB + S3 self-hosted, 7 services + token) — with emphasis on response envelopes, lazy-load pattern for self-hosting services, positional-arg surprise on getToken/getAttachment/saveAttachment, typed error class hierarchy, and data models (PartialCommentAnnotation, BaseMetadata, resolvedByUserId three-state semantics, round-trip dict helpers).
